title: スぺの緊急牧場ガイド

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Special Week has invited Silence Suzuka and me
out today. She eagerly proclaimed that she'd
bring us somewhere "really, really special."

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
Um, Spe? Is this it? The place you wanted to
bring us, I mean.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: (Where... Where are we?!)

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
(What now?! I meant to bring us to the
amusement park that just opened, but we ended
up on this farm! How did I get us so lost?!)

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
Um... This is a really nice place. The view is
gorgeous, and the air is so clean and refreshing.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Huh?

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
I wouldn't have been able to come to such a
wonderful place if you hadn't invited me out, so,
um, please don't stress out too much.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
(Wait... Does Suzuka not realize we're lost?! Is she
actually excited to explore around here?)

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Y-yeah, it sure is great here, huh? Now let me
take you around!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Huh? But Spe, aren't we los—

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Okay, let's go! There are, uh, a lot of cool things
here at Fluffy Farm! ...Probably!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: I think this is actually called "Fuzzy Farm."

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Huh?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Despite clearly having brought us to the wrong
place, Special Week starts taking us around the
farm with great enthusiasm.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
So what did you think of the goat-petting corner,
Suzuka?

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
The goats were so friendly that I didn't know what
to do with myself at first, but they were very cute.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
Besides, you've been such a lively guide that your
excitement has completely rubbed off on me.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
(Phew! I've never been here, but luckily I know my
way around farms! Suzuka really seems to be
enjoying herself!)

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: You're a top-notch guide. Hehe.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Y-you think so? Geez... Hahaha, you're flattering
me!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Oh, I know! Let me show you something really
cool!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Special Week buys several bottles of milk, stands
before the field where all the dairy cows are, and
starts drinking the bottles one by one.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Okay, I've got it! The milk from the first bottle I
drank came from that Guernsey cow over there!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
The second bottle came from the Jersey cow in
front of us, and the third bottle came from the
big Holstein cow way in the back!

text_block_list.name: Dairy Cows
text_block_list.text: Mooooo.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
Huh? I knew you were able to tell different milk
brands apart, but you can even tell which cows
gave which milk?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Yep! I've been drinking milk instead of water ever
since I was a little kid! I practically have milk
running through my veins!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
Wow... It's not just milk you know a lot about, but
cows as well. I'm positive you're the best milk
expert in Japan, Spe.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Hehe! Well, I wouldn't go that far!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. I'd love to look around more, but it's about
time we head home. Lead the way, Spe.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Oh, I mean... um...
choice_data_list: It's time to come clean, Spe.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Great idea! They have a butter-making workshop
over there, so let's stay and have some more fun!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Um... Okay then. Let's take a look.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
O-oh! And we can't forget to drop by the gift
shop! Ha, haha...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After wandering around a bit more, Special Week
eventually comes clean. We ask around and
somehow find our way back to the academy in the
end.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Waaaaah! I'm so sorry, Suzuka!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
To be honest... I meant to bring you guys to an
amusement park! I have no idea where we are
right now!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
It's okay, Spe. I knew that from the beginning.
Besides...

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
Even though things didn't go according to plan, I
still had a lot of fun thanks to my wonderful
guide.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: S-S-Suzukaaaaa!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Afterwards, we ask the farm workers for
directions back to the academy and make it home
safely.
